title: lastrea villosa
intro: Lastrea villosa, also known as the Hairy Fern or Hairy Lady Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Athyriaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Asia and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of Lastrea villosa include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being, and to support the immune system.
